content.query:
----CREATE SCHEMA FOR MiPINS VIEWS IF ONE DOES NOT EXIST

IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT  *
                FROM    sys.schemas
                WHERE   name = 'mipins' )
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA mipins]');
GO

----CREATE VIEW FOR EMPLOYEE

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee
AS
SELECT DISTINCT

 hrr.HRRecordID
,hrr.EmployeeID as PersonID
,CASE
    WHEN emp.Gender = 'Female' THEN '01'
    WHEN emp.Gender = 'Male' THEN '02'
    ELSE '03' 
    END AS GenderID
,hrr.LocationID
,hrr.PayBandID as GradeID
,hrr.PersonnelAreaID
,hrr.PayrollAreaID
,hrr.OrganisationalUnitID
,hrr.PersonnelSubAreaID
,hrr.ContractID as WorkContractID
,hrr.CompanyCode
,hrr.CostCenterID
,hrr.EmployeeGroupID
,hrr.PositionID
,hrr.WorkScheduleID

--,CASE 
--    WHEN CivilServiceStart is not null THEN CivilServiceStart
--    WHEN DateToCurrentJob is not null THEN DateToCurrentJob
--    ELSE NULL
--    END AS EmployeeStartDate

 FROM  [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_record_fact] hrr

 LEFT JOIN  [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp
 ON  hrr.EmployeeID = emp.EmployeeID
 AND emp.IsActive = 'Y'

 WHERE hrr.IsActive = 'Y'
 AND hrr.EmployeeID IS NOT NULL

 --SELECT * FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_record_fact] hrr WHERE hrr.IsActive = 'Y' AND hrr.EmployeeID IS NOT NULL
GO

--Cost Centre

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_costcentre
AS
SELECT DISTINCT
CostCenterID
,CostCenterCode
,Description as CostCenterCentre
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_costcenter_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'
GO

--Employee Group

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employeegroup
AS
SELECT DISTINCT
EmployeeGroupID
,EEGrp
,EmployeeGroup as EmployeeGroup
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employeegroup_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'
GO

--Position

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_position
AS
SELECT DISTINCT
PositionID 
,PositionCode
,Description as Position
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_position_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'
GO

--Work Schedule

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_work_schedule
AS
SELECT DISTINCT
 WorkScheduleID
,WorkScheduleRule
,WorkWeekDays
,WorkWeekHours
,WorkDayHours
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_work_schedule_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'
GO

---CREATE EMPLOYEE DETAILS
CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee_details
AS
SELECT DISTINCT

emp.EmployeeID as PersonID
,emp.FirstName as EmployeeFirstName
,emp.LastName as EmployeeLastName
,(emp.FirstName + ' ' + emp.LastName) as EmployeeName
,m1.managerEmployeeID as L1ManagerID
,(emp1.FirstName + ' ' + emp1.LastName) as L1ManagerName
,m2.managerEmployeeID as L2ManagerID
,(emp2.FirstName + ' ' + emp2.LastName) as L2ManagerName
,emp.Postcode 

 FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp

 LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim] m1
 ON m1.EmployeeID = emp.EmployeeID
 AND m1.IsActive = 'Y'

 LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp1
 ON m1.managerEmployeeID = emp1.EmployeeID
 AND emp1.IsActive = 'Y'
  
  LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim] m2
 ON m2.EmployeeID = m1.managerEmployeeID
 AND m2.IsActive = 'Y'

  LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp2
 ON m2.managerEmployeeID = emp2.EmployeeID
 AND emp2.IsActive = 'Y'

 WHERE emp.IsActive = 'Y'
 GO

----CREATE VIEW FOR GENDER

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_gender

AS

SELECT DISTINCT 
 CASE
    WHEN Gender = 'Female' THEN '01'
    WHEN Gender = 'Male' THEN '02'
    ELSE '03' 
    END AS GenderID
, Gender
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'
GO

----CREATE VIEW FOR GRADE

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_grade

AS

SELECT 
 PayBandID as GradeID
,PSGroupCode as Grade
,CASE 
    WHEN Description IS NULL THEN PSGroupCode
    ELSE Description 
    END as GradeDescription
,CASE 
    WHEN PSGroupCode = 'APP AO' THEN 'AO'
    WHEN PSGroupCode = 'APP EO' THEN 'EO'
    WHEN PSGroupCode = 'GM' THEN 'G6'
    WHEN PSGroupCode = 'SCSPB1' THEN 'G5+'
    WHEN PSGroupCode = 'SCSPB2' THEN 'G5+'
    ELSE PSGroupCode
    END as GradeGroupV1
,CASE 
    WHEN PSGroupCode IN ('AA','AO','APP AO') THEN 'AA & AO'
    WHEN PSGroupCode = 'GM' THEN 'G6'
    WHEN PSGroupCode = 'SCSPB1' THEN 'G5+'
    WHEN PSGroupCode = 'SCSPB2' THEN 'G5+'
    ELSE PSGroupCode
    END as GradeGroupV2
,CASE 
    WHEN PSGroupCode IN ('APO','BAND 1','BAND 2','BAND 3') THEN 'Inspector'
    ELSE 'OTH/P'
    END as JobCategoryShort
,CASE 
    WHEN PSGroupCode IN ('APO','BAND 1','BAND 2','BAND 3') THEN 'Inspector'
    ELSE 'Other Profession'
    END as JobCategory
,IsActive
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_payband_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'
GO

--CREATE Absence View

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_absence

AS

SELECT DISTINCT
 ab.AbsenceStartDate
,ab.AbsenceEndDate
,month(ab.AbsenceEndDate)   as endMonth
,year(ab.AbsenceEndDate)    as endYear
,day(ab.AbsenceEndDate)     as endDay
,ab.SicknessGroup
,ab.AbsenceType
,ab.EmployeeID as PersonID
,ws.WorkScheduleRule -- join to work schedule rule
,'' as SicknessId
--,'' as LeaveONS
,'' as AbsenceHours
,cast(ab.Days as float) AbsenceDays
,cast(ab.CalendarDays as float) AbsenceCalDays
--,AnnualLeaveStart
,CASE 
    WHEN ab.AbsenceType = 'Sickness' THEN 'Sickness'
    WHEN ab.AbsenceType LIKE '%Annual%' THEN 'Annual'
    ELSE 'Other'
END AS AbsenceGroup
,CASE 
    WHEN ab.AbsenceType = 'Sickness' AND cast(ab.Days as float) >= 21 THEN 'long-term'
    WHEN ab.AbsenceType = 'Sickness' AND cast(ab.Days as float) <= 20 THEN 'short-term'
ELSE NULL
END AS SicknessLengthType
,CASE 
    WHEN ab.AbsenceType = 'Sickness' THEN ab.Days
    ELSE NULL
END AS SicknessLength

FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_absence_dim] ab

LEFT JOIN[odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_work_schedule_dim] ws
ON ab.WorkScheduleID = ws.WorkScheduleID
AND ws.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE ab.IsActive = 'Y'
GO

--CREATE Personnel Area

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_personnel_area

AS

SELECT DISTINCT
 PersonnelAreaID
,PersonnelAreaCode
,Description as PersonnelArea
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_personnel_area_dim]
GO

-- MIPINS PAYROLL AREA VIEW

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_payroll_area

AS

SELECT DISTINCT
 PayrollAreaID
,PayrollAreaCode
,Description as PayrollArea
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_payroll_area_dim]
GO

-- MIPINS ORGANISATION UNIT VIEW

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_organisation_unit
AS
SELECT DISTINCT
 OrganisationUnitID
,OrganisationUnit as OrganisationUnitCode
,Description as OrganisationUnit
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_organisation_unit_dim]
GO

-- MIPINS PERSONNEL SUB AREA VIEW

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_personnel_sub_area
AS
SELECT DISTINCT
 PersonnelSubAreaID
,PersonnelSubAreaCode
,Description as PersonnelSubArea
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_personnel_sub_area_dim]
GO

-- MIPINS WORK CONTRACT VIEW

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_work_contract
AS
SELECT DISTINCT
 ContractID as WorkContractID
,ContractCode as WorkContractCode
,Description as WorkContract
,CASE 
    WHEN Description = 'Permanent' THEN 'Permanent'
    ELSE 'Non-Permanent'
    END as WorkContractType
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_contract_dim]
GO

-- LEAVER VIEW

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_leavers
AS
SELECT DISTINCT

lv.EmployeeLeaversID
,lv.EmployeeID  as PersonID
,lv.ReasonForLeaving
,lv.EmploymentEndDate as LeaveDate
,cal.CalendarYear as LeaveYear
,cal.CalendarMonth as LeaveMonth
,cal.FinancialYear as LeaveFY

FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_leavers_dim] lv

LEFT JOIN [default].[dbo].[calendar_dim] cal 
ON cal.CalendarDate = lv.EmploymentEndDate

WHERE lv.IsActive = 'Y'
GO

--CREATE JOINERS VIEW

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners
AS
SELECT DISTINCT

 st.EmployeeID as PersonID
,CASE 
    WHEN CivilServiceStart is not null THEN CivilServiceStart
    WHEN DateToCurrentJob is not null THEN DateToCurrentJob
    ELSE NULL
    END AS EmployeeStartDate

FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] st

WHERE IsActive = 'Y'
AND (CivilServiceStart is not null OR DateToCurrentJob is not null)
GO

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners_detail
AS
SELECT DISTINCT

 st.PersonID
,st.EmployeeStartDate
,cal.CalendarYear as StartYear
,cal.CalendarMonth as StartMonth
,cal.FinancialYear as StartFY

FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners st

LEFT JOIN [default].[dbo].[calendar_dim] cal 
ON cal.CalendarDate = St.EmployeeStartDate
GO

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_calendar
AS 
SELECT * 
FROM 
[default].[dbo].[calendar_dim]


-- CHECK VIEWS EXIST AND HAVE DATA

--Select * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee_details GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_costcentre
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employeegroup
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_position
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_work_schedule
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_gender GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_grade GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_absence GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_personnel_area GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_payroll_area GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_organisation_unit GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_personnel_sub_area GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_work_contract GO
--Select * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_leavers WHERE PersonID = 1872 GO
--Select * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners WHERE PersonID = 1872 GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners_detail GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_cost_centre GO
--Select Top(1) * FROM mipins.vw_mipins_calendar GO

Select Top(1000) *

--Employee Master Record
FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee aa
--select top(100) * from mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee where PersonID = 1720

--Employee Details
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee_details bb
ON aa.PersonID = bb.PersonID
--select top(100) * from mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee_details

--Work Contract Details
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_work_contract cc
ON aa.WorkContractID = cc.WorkContractID

--Grade and Role Details
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_grade dd
ON aa.GradeID = dd.GradeID

--Personnel Area
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_personnel_area ee
ON aa.PersonnelAreaID = ee.PersonnelAreaID

--Personnel Sub Area
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_personnel_sub_area ff
ON aa.PersonnelSubAreaID = ff.PersonnelSubAreaID

--Payroll Area
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_payroll_area gg
ON aa.PayrollAreaID = gg.PayrollAreaID

--Organisational Unit
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_organisation_unit hh
ON aa.OrganisationalUnitID = hh.OrganisationUnitID

--Gender
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_gender mm
ON aa.GenderID = mm.GenderID

--CostCentre
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_costcentre nn
ON aa.CostCenterID = nn.CostCenterID

--EmployeeGRoup
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employeegroup oo
ON aa.EmployeeGroupID = oo.EmployeeGroupID

--Position
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_position pp
ON aa.PositionID = pp.PositionID

--Position
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_work_schedule qq
ON aa.WorkScheduleID = qq.WorkScheduleID


--Leavers
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_leavers jj
--ON aa.PersonID = jj.PersonID

--Joiners
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners_detail kk
--ON aa.PersonID = kk.PersonId

--Cost Centre
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_cost_centre ll
--ON aa.

GO

--ON aa.
